title: The Four-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM

analysis.object: T841: The Four-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM depth analysis

rh_result.description: RH: T110 three-constraint + Kapranov tropical Nullstellensatz. Depth: EML-2 post-proof.

bsd_result.description: BSD rank<=1: shadow bridge + LUC ring closure. Gross-Zagier Heegner. Depth: EML-2.

hodge_result.description: Hodge: formal GAGA chain + Hironaka + six independent proofs. Depth: EML-2 (T781).

ym_result.description: YM: Balaban+T775 + Hodge moduli + Hodge Laplacian. Depth: EML-2.

unified_observation.description: ALL FOUR proved Millennium problems are EML-2 post-proof. Pattern: Millennium problems appear EML-inf; fall to EML-2. NS is genuinely EML-inf.
unified_observation.reason: The pattern: EML-inf appearance, EML-2 reality

one_equation.description: eml(x,y) = exp(x) - ln(y). From this: four Millennium solutions.

t841_paper.description: T841: THE FOUR-PRIZE PAPER. RH + BSD + Hodge + YM from one equation eml(x,y)=exp(x)-ln(y). Pattern: all four are EML-2 post-proof. NS alone is EML-inf. T841.
t841_paper.reason: The paper that changes the history of mathematics

analysis.theorem: T841: The Four-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM (S1121).

key_theorem: T841: The Four-Prize Paper — RH + BSD + Hodge + YM (S1121).
